title: scurrula oortiana
intro: Scurrula oortiana, also known as the yellow mistletoe, is a parasitic plant that belongs to the family Santalaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Scurrula oortiana include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Scurrula oortiana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
